'''Dree-Tekes''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the decade leading up to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gran/Legends|Gran]], Dree-Tekes was inducted into the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] where she received [[Jedi training/Legends|instruction]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], eventually being selected as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] by a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]. During her apprenticeship, Dree-Tekes was dispatched to the Gran colony world, [[Stend IV]], in order to prevent the [[Army of Life]] from releasing [[clodhopper]]s on the planet.<ref name="OCH" />

Upon her arrival on the planet, Dree-Tekes recruited four local Gran militiamen to help her in her attempt to board the terrorist group's delivery ship, the ''[[Majestic Gundark]]''. As the [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] touched down on the planet to deliver its cargo of clodhoppers which were intended to be used in restoring the natural order of the planet, Padawan Dree-Tekes led her allies in a raid on the ship, hoping to destroy the cargo before it could be unloaded.<ref name="OCH" />
